business_question: What are the total sales and quantity sold by product category for the current month?
business_context: The Retail Sales Manager wants to identify top-performing product categories and monitor monthly sales trends.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    p.product_category,
    SUM(f.sales_amount) AS total_sales,
    SUM(f.quantity_sold) AS total_quantity
FROM fact_sales f
JOIN dim_product p
    ON f.product_key = p.product_key
JOIN dim_date d
    ON f.date_key = d.date_key
WHERE d.month = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  AND d.year = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY p.product_category
ORDER BY total_sales DESC;
